ML Kit terms reference

Component: com.google.mlkit:text-recognition-chinese:16.0.1
Terms: https://developers.google.com/ml-kit/terms

Use of ML Kit is governed by the current ML Kit Terms of Service and the terms
incorporated there. The Android build extracts the component's bundled
third_party_licenses.txt and third_party_licenses.json files into the APK under
assets/licenses/ml-kit/ so the open-source notices shipped by the exact resolved
artifact remain available with the distributed application.
